name: nekko-mcp
description: Local-first runtime & manager for MCP servers — run servers securely (process sandbox or Docker), supervise them, and expose one gateway endpoint for any agent harness. A ToolHive rival you own.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @nekko-mcp/shared && npm run build -w @nekko-mcp/core && npm run build -w @nekko-mcp/daemon
